profile.intro: Hi, With 6+ years of experience in developing websites and apps, I'm a Full Stack Software Developer and UI/UX Developer from Nepal. I have a passion for coding & I am always looking to leverage my programming skills as a developer. I love to learn new things and find ways to improve myself. If you are here, let's build something amazing together.
profile.intro1: I have experience building websites, webApps and Android App. I am experienced as a front end developer with expertise on HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JS; and I have a well rounded knowledge of using Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator. I am also experienced with React, NextJS, NodeJS, ExpressJS, MongoDB and FireBase.

meroparty.title: MeroParty
meroparty.description: Built a Venue Management Tool using Node.js and React. Developed web and app interfaces for venue-side management and mentored junior developers.

icc.title: ICC Communications
icc.description: Leveraged multilingual skills (English, Nepali, Japanese) to engage diverse customers. Increased SIM card and mobile phone sales through effective support.

axiosSoftworks.title: Axios Softworks
axiosSoftworks.description: Developed web applications using Node.js, React, and Ruby on Rails for projects like NIVID School Management. Contributed to an Android app using Kotlin.

cloudFactory.title: Cloud Factory
cloudFactory.description: Collected and annotated image data using proprietary tools for AI model training and data processing.

meroparty.title: Meroparty.com
meroparty.description: Meroparty is an event/venue management and e-commerce website to view and compare event venues and also manage the venues like bookings, halls, invoices. I worked as a web designer, full-stack developer. The site hosted from 2024.

zBlog.title: Z Blog
zBlog.description: A blogging type simple CMS web project, Build with Node Js at backend and handbrake template engine, pagination.

zeitsuETrade.title: Zeitsu E-trade
zeitsuETrade.description: An e-commerce web project for product sale, Build with Laravel at backend and Blade template engine, Cart system, toastr notification, Product pagination, Session  and cart checkout using Stripe.

gbcc.title: Gesture Based Cursor Control
gbcc.description: A python based application which uses a web camera to capture image of hand and control the mouse events such as click, scroll, based on the gestures performed using the hand.

vKec.title: Virtual KEC
vKec.description: A 3D model-based application to provide user an experience of viewing academic buildings, laboratory buildings of KEC College in virtually designed 3D space with the aim of familiarizing the college compound to new prospects.

runner.title: Runner Runner
runner.description: A simple graphics-based gaming application with 2D drawings, art and animations implementing a continuous loop of animation, plot positions-based collider functions, score points based on duration of survival and double buffering for smooth operation.

companyDB.title: Company Database
companyDB.description: Employee Management System project built to manage employee details and records of an organization or company. It uses CRUD operations with authentication and authorization.

plustwonotes.title: Plustwonotes.com
plustwonotes.description: Plustwonotes is an educational website to share and post educational material of grade 11 and 12. I worked as a web designer, Content Creator and manager. The site hosted for 3 years.

bigData.title: Big Data Workshop
bigData.description: 2-day workshop at Pulchowk Campus providing practical insights on Hadoop, HDFS, Flume, and Pig.

studentICT.title: Student ICT Conference
studentICT.description: Participated in the conference regarding the digitization of Nepal, organized by IT-S.

yCC.title: Yomari Code Camp
yCC.description: Built a Unity project for earthquake emergency virtual practice in the 1-Day code camp.

advJava.title: Advanced Java
advJava.description: Advanced training in Web Development using Java Spring Framework and JSP.

androidDev.title: Android Application Development
androidDev.description: Focused on Android App Development using Java and modern UI/UX designs.

webDevCamp.title: Web Development Camp
webDevCamp.description: Intensive camp focused on Modern Web Development technologies and industry standards.

krustile.title: Web Designing
krustile.description: Foundational course covering HTML, CSS, JS, and JQuery.

jlpt.title: Japanese Language Proficiency Test
jlpt.description: Successfully passed the Japanese Language Preparation Test 2023 at the N3 proficiency level.

yCC.title: KU IT Meet 2017
yCC.description: Awarded for the virtual practice application designed to cope with natural disasters with safety measures.

digitalAd.title: Ace Kaleidoscope 2014
digitalAd.description: Winner of the award for creating a 100-second length video depicting an ad for an educational website.
